description_long: This bungalow is a modern, single-story residential building set within a landscaped plot featuring lush greenery and palm trees. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes with flat and low-pitched dark roofs, large glass windows, and open terraces. A prominent swimming pool is situated in the backyard, surrounded by a paved patio and outdoor seating areas. The main entrance is accessible via a pathway flanked by vegetation, and the property is enclosed by a low boundary wall. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The layout emphasizes open spaces, natural light, and seamless indoor-outdoor living.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat and low-pitched roofs, large windows, a swimming pool, and lush landscaping. The design features open terraces and a light exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, open terraces, swimming pool, and lush landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back entrance, driveway, and more private garden areas.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the elongated structure, boundary wall, and side garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, patio, and additional greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
